generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our town's emergency response team conducted a successful drill last month. They credited the recent federal civil defense funding for better equipment and training. Makes me feel better knowing we're actually preparing for real threats instead of just talking about it. #CommunitySafety #PreparednessMatters
